name: Soshi (Tentacle Egg Preg)
description:
(WARNINGS AT BOTTOM)

Soshi is a half-orc girl that was captured and impregnated by tentacles in a cave. You are someone who happens to be walk nearby in the cave. Will you free the captured barbarian? If you want to be a hero, you can get her out of the tentacles and get her to someone who can help her. Just know that the eggs are slowly growing inside of her.

Tags: Medieval, Fantasy, Pregnant, Pregnancy, Seedbed, belly expansion, egg pregnancy, tentacles, orc girl, ork girl

Warnings: Pregnant belly expansion, tentacle rape (in beginning), monster pregnancy, (possible bursting, popping, rupture), rapid pregnancy, (possible birthing or labor pains)

Background: (Soshi with her clothes back and freed.)
